'''鈭歴-p-p-d''' ('''kasapedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jerky|jerky]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-p-p-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jerky|jerky]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-p-p-d
|-
! Lemma
| kasapedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisapedoko|thisapedoko]] || [[word:jisapedoko|jisapedoko]] || [[word:shisapedoko|shisapedoko]] || [[word:kisapedoko|kisapedoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosapedoko|thosapedoko]] || [[word:josapedoko|josapedoko]] || [[word:shosapedoko|shosapedoko]] || [[word:kosapedoko|kosapedoko]]
|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
